3032090.name: The Chancellor's Plot Demo
3032090.description:
The Chancellor's Plot is a first-person horror game set in the 1840s.

You are a salvage expert who has been offered a small fortune to investigate a Austrian manor in search for a coveted artifact. You will find puzzles to solve in order to progress and terrifying monsters guarding the grounds.

This demo contains a vertical slice of gameplay and is about 15 minutes long.

Features:
Explore an abandoned victorian mansion.
Solve inventory based puzzles.
Use stealth to sneak past and hide from dangerous enemies.
Experience a gripping story of intrigue.
